text:
fstab:
/dev/ad0s3b    none            swap     sw  0  0
/dev/ad0s3a    /               ufs      rw  1  1
/dev/ad0s3e    /tmp            ufs      rw  2  2
/dev/ad0s3f    /usr            ufs      rw  2  2
/dev/ad0s3d    /var            ufs      rw  2  2
/dev/ad0s4     /usr/home       ufs      rw  2  2
..
/usr/home/www  /usr/local/www  unionfs  rw  0  0
..
/dev/ad0s2     /mnt/c_disk     msdos    rw,-W=koi2dos,-L=ru_RU.KOI8-R           0       0
/dev/ad0s5     /mnt/d_disk     msdos    rw,-W=koi2dos,-L=ru_RU.KOI8-R           0       0
